ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortgage_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortgage rate record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the mortgage rates were recorded */,
  "mortgage15us" REAL /* 15-year mortgage rate */,
  "mortgage30us" REAL /* 30-year mortgage rate */,
  "mortgage5us" REAL /* 5-year mortgage rate */,
  "mortmrgn5us" REAL /* 5-year mortgage margin */,
  "mortpts15us" REAL /* 15-year mortgage points */,
  "mortpts30us" REAL /* 30-year mortgage points */,
  "mortpts5us" REAL /* 5-year mortgage points */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the economic indicators were recorded */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP (Gross Domestic Product) */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortgage_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortgage analytics record */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortgage rate record being analyzed */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the mortgage rate was forecasted */,
  "forecasted_rate" REAL /* Forecasted mortgage rate */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the forecast */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortgage_analytics_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES mortgage_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic analytics record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator record being analyzed */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the economic indicator was forecasted */,
  "forecasted_indicator" REAL /* Forecasted economic indicator */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for the forecast */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model used for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_analytics_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytics record being visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Visualization data */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "visualization_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES economic_analytics ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES mortgage_analytics ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system log record */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the system log was recorded */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* System log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date the backup was created */,
  "backup_data" TEXT /* Backup data */,
  "backup_size" INTEGER /* Size of the backup data */,
  "backup_status" TEXT /* Status of the backup (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mortgage_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortgage type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mortgage type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mortgage type */,
  "interest_type" TEXT /* Type of interest (e.g., fixed, variable) */,
  "min_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for the mortgage type */,
  "max_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the mortgage type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization type */,
  "interactivity" TEXT /* Indicates whether the visualization is interactive (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)
